title: T-064 — UI: PLN-030 Allergen Override on Sequencing (spec-driven inline modal)
prompt:
Implement spec-driven UI: PLN-030 Allergen Override on Sequencing (spec-driven inline modal) for 04-PLANNING-BASIC. No standalone prototype component is required because PRD/UX declare this as an inline/composed surface. Read PRD refs §10.5, §10.7, UX §4 PLAN-MODAL-11 and UX section lines before coding. Use shadcn/Radix primitives, next-intl, server-side RBAC/business validation, and existing module contracts.

Details: Inline modal launched from sequencing rows. Requires override reason, before/after allergen/changeover impact, RBAC guard, audit event, and clear badge on affected WO rows. It is composed inside the PLN-011 sequencing page rather than a standalone prototype label.

Closeout must include screenshots/artifacts, Playwright traces, changed files, tests, AC status, deviations, and git status.

pipeline_inputs.description: UI: PLN-030 Allergen Override on Sequencing (spec-driven inline modal)
pipeline_inputs.details: Inline modal launched from sequencing rows. Requires override reason, before/after allergen/changeover impact, RBAC guard, audit event, and clear badge on affected WO rows. It is composed inside the PLN-011 sequencing page rather than a standalone prototype label.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Workflow dry-run and permissions consume Settings rule registry and flag contracts.

acceptance_criteria: Given the composed/spec-driven UI renders, then it satisfies the PRD/UX fields, validations, RBAC gates, copy hierarchy, and state transitions listed in pipeline_inputs.details.
Given invalid/blocked/action-not-allowed cases occur, then the UI displays server-returned validation and audit requirements without client-invented business state.
Given closeout is prepared, then screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace artifacts are attached for happy path and blocked/error states.
Given tests run, then targeted RTL/component tests and Playwright e2e pass with 0 failures. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED component test for form fields and validation states.
Playwright e2e for open/edit/confirm/cancel and blocked path with trace enabled.
Run targeted pnpm vitest and pnpm playwright commands.
ui_closeout_evidence: Playwright trace artifacts for happy path and blocked/error path.
Spec-driven parity notes citing PRD/UX refs.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
